title: alsomitra trifoliolata
intro: Alsomitra trifoliolata, also known as the Indian yam or Indian cucumber, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cucurbitaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to stimulate the digestive system and relieve symptoms of indigestion and nausea. The health benefits of Alsomitra trifoliolata include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, as well as its use in traditional medicine to treat fever, rheumatism, and other ailments. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve boiling or steaming the roots and leaves, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or poultices for medicinal purposes.
